❤️ Support the service

If this service has been useful to you, you can help keep it running with a donation. Donations are used for server, domain, and development costs.

Supporter benefits

  • Possible access to Sorola's private password vault.
  • Possible access to Sorola's private cloud storage.
  • The chance to test new features before others.
  • Helping fund the service's development.

Benefits are optional thank-you perks for supporters and are not a service guarantee.
